---
title: "Pooling the Poles"
page-layout: full
image: "PTP images/thumbnail.png"
open-graph:
  title: "Pooling the Poles"
  description: "Interactive Polish polling tracker"
  image: "PTP images/thumbnail.png"
twitter-card:
  title: "Pooling the Poles"
  description: "Interactive Polish polling tracker"
  image: "PTP images/thumbnail.png"
  card-style: summary_large_image
---

<iframe src="https://ben-stanley.shinyapps.io/polish-polls/" width="100%" height="1200px" style="border:none;"></iframe>
